Author: rail
Name: BeastieBuddy
Punchline: A searchable mob database with spawn locations for Beastmaster, Blue Mage, or hunts.
Description: A searchable list of all mobs and their known locations, using community data. Now includes a Blue Mage spellbook. Use /bbuddy to open.
Changelog:
v7.45.1:version matching to game patch
v1.3.3.1:api bump, search hang fix
v1.3.3.0: UI adjustments and data syncing improvements.
v1.3.2.0:stats
